headline: A Look At TE Connectivity (TEL) Valuation After Dividend Increase And Expanded Buyback Program
summary: TE Connectivity (TEL) has drawn fresh attention after its board approved a 10% lift in the regular quarterly dividend to US$0.78 per share and expanded its share repurchase authorization by US$3b. See our latest analysis for TE Connectivity. Even with the dividend lift and larger buyback authorization, TE Connectivity’s recent share price has pulled back, with a 30 day share price return of 16.9% and a year to date share price return of a 16.0% decline.
